steps.title: Use the percent-of-100 shortcut
steps.content: When the number is $100$, a percent of it is especially fast: $34\%$ of $100$ is just $34$.

steps.title: Check with multiplication
steps.content: The formal calculation gives the same result: $$34\%=\frac{34}{100}$$ $$\frac{34}{100}\cdot 100=34$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A, $34$, is $34\%$ of $100$. Correct.
  • Choice B, $68$, would be $68\%$ of $100$.
  • Choice C, $66$, is $34\%$ less than $100$, not $34\%$ of $100$.
  • Choice D, $134$, is $34\%$ greater than $100$, not $34\%$ of $100$.
That is the correct answer.
